method_note: Combined score blends FIT ~40% (callback_op / D_spike_operator / A_requirements / hidden-gate clearance), ACTIVE-HIRING ~30% (active_hiring_signal score+tier), RECENCY+MOMENTUM ~20% (G_recency + H_momentum), LIVE-STATUS/ACTIONABILITY ~10% (confirmed-live + working apply route; founder-direct routes credited, unconfirmed/expired listings docked). Reasoned, not averaged. Constraint applied: weekend/6-7-day work = disqualified (only Corgi, already excluded). All listed roles are standard Mon-Fri (5-day, in-office or hybrid). Excluded per instruction: Geordie AI, Dwelly (both roles - already applied), Corgi (weekend dealbreaker).
